g.desc: Question: A man comes to emergency with stab injury to left f...
g.text: Question:A man comes to emergency with stab injury to left flank. He has stable vitals. What would be the next step in management?Options:A) CECTB) Diagnostic peritoneal lavageC) LaprotomyD) Laproscopy
